steps.title: Write the line equation
steps.content: The line crosses the $y$-axis at $(0,-8)$, so the $y$-intercept is $-8$. With slope $4$, the equation is $$y=4x-8$$

steps.title: Evaluate at the given x-value
steps.content: The point $(18,w)$ lies on the line, so substitute $x=18$: $$w=4(18)-8$$ $$w=72-8$$ The answer is 64.
